info.description: Audit trail for every content sync operation triggered between environments

options.comment: Managed by strapi-plugin-env-sync. Do not modify manually.

triggeredBy.comment: The admin user who triggered this sync

documentId.comment: Strapi v5 documentId of the synced document

locale.comment: Locale being synced, or null for non-i18n content

isDryRun.comment: If true, no data was written — this was a preview run

diffSummary.comment: Structured diff: { fieldsChanged: [], relationsUpdated: [], mediaReuploaded: [], localesSynced: [] }

payload.comment: Full serialised document payload sent to target (retained for debugging)

errorMessage.comment: Human-readable error message if status = failed

errorStack.comment: Stack trace for debugging — only stored in non-production envs

retryCount.comment: Number of retry attempts made before success or final failure

completedAt.comment: When the sync completed (success or failure)

targetUrl.comment: The URL of the target environment that received the sync

idempotencyKey.comment: Unique key preventing duplicate concurrent syncs: {documentId}:{targetEnv}:{triggeredAt}
